publicationStmt.p: This XML text (filename tlg2115014.xml) was generated by Diogenes (version 4.7.2) from the TLG corpus of classical texts (author number 2115, work number 014), which was once distributed on CD-ROM in a very different file format, and which may be subject to licensing restrictions.

sourceDesc.p: Hippolytus Scr. Eccl. (c. A.D. 3), Fragmenta in Proverbia [Dub.] (2115: 014) "Hippolyt's kleinere exegetische und homiletische Schriften", Ed. Achelis, H. Leipzig: Hinrichs, 1897; Die griechischen christlichen Schriftsteller 1.2.

div.p: Καθάπαξ ἀδύνατον νοηθῆναι. οὐ καθάπαξ, φησίν, „ἀδύνατον νοῆσαι“.
Ὁ τὴν τοῦ „θεοῦ δόξαν“ ἢ τὴν τοῦ „βασιλέως κρύπτων“ παρ' ἑαυτῷ, τιμᾷ πρόσταγμα αὐτοῦ.
